/bin/c++  -O3 -march=native -flto -pipe -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/mympd.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/mympd.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mympd.dir/src/player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mympd.dir/src/playlist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mympd.dir/src/pipewire_output.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mympd.dir/src/command_server.cpp.o -o mympd  -lpthread /usr/lib64/libavformat.so /usr/lib64/libavcodec.so /usr/lib64/libswresample.so /usr/lib64/libavutil.so /usr/lib64/libpipewire-0.3.so
